title: Vegapunk Reveals the Sinking World
description: On pages 1–3, this part focuses on Pacifista, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Bonney, Vegapunk as Vegapunk’s message shakes the world by connecting the Void Century, Joy Boy, ancient weapons, the sinking world, and the Five Elders’ desperate attempt to stop the truth.
scene: Vegapunk’s message shakes the world by connecting the Void Century, Joy Boy, ancient weapons, the sinking world, and the Five Elders’ desperate attempt to stop the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can't let Emperor straw hat's crew escape!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'll be a disaster if jewelry Bonney gets away!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She is no more than a little 12-year-old girl...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and you gave her the power to eradicate entire nations.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your defiance is as foolish as it is insolent, vegapunk!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Let's hurry back to the ship!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Yeah, some Scaary lookin' guys just arrived!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Target the ship from Elbaf and sink it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Get to the north- Eastern front on the double!

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: Hey, Giants! Take care of my dad!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're not gonna let you keep a single one of our war machines!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...Is a hero! You cleft- chimned Geezer!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: This is hard to watch! Stop it!

summary: This part advances the Vegapunk’s Broadcast through 31 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
